parallel--c0330549-e1af-495b-8b1e-c2c9f3.name: Implement detection rules for resource exhaustion indicators

description: This is an automatically generated playbook based on the question: A detections playbook for T1499 of MITRE ATT&CK Matrix for Enterprise framework is required.The target platform is Windows. You can find more information at https://attack.mitre.org/detectionstrategies/DET0208#AN0584 . The description of the approach follows: Excessive resource exhaustion or service crash induced by processes launched by users or scripts that rapidly consume CPU/memory or attempt malformed service interactions.

external_references.name: MITRE ATT&CK Technique T1499: Endpoint Denial of Service

items.content: Establish baseline monitoring for normal CPU and memory usage patterns on Windows endpoints and servers.
Deploy and configure real-time monitoring tools to track process creation, system resource consumption (CPU, memory, handles), and service health.
Monitor for processes with sustained CPU usage above 90% for extended periods
Detect processes allocating abnormally high memory (e.g., >2GB for typical user processes)
Identify rapid spawning of child processes with similar resource consumption patterns
Monitor for service crash events (Event ID 7031, 7023, 7026) in System logs
Detect abnormal service control requests (start/stop/restart) from non-administrative accounts
Implement detection rules for resource exhaustion indicators
Set thresholds for CPU/memory usage that trigger alerts when exceeded
Correlate resource exhaustion events with process parent-child relationships
Implement time-based detection for rapid resource consumption spikes
Cross-reference with user account activity and login sessions
Implement automated response actions for confirmed cases: isolate affected endpoints, terminate malicious processes, and restart crashed services.
Conduct forensic analysis on affected systems to identify root cause and persistence mechanisms.
Update detection rules based on investigation findings and threat intelligence.
